title: Anthropic撤销Claude订阅编程使用暂停计划
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
🚨 AI News | TestingCatalog
@testingcatalog
ANTHROPIC 🔥: Claude users will continue being able to use their subscriptions for programmatic use, built on top of the Agent SDK.
> Earlier, Anthropic shared an announcement that they will pause programmatic use consuming subscription rate limits.
> Recently, users have receiv m that this is no longer a plan.
In case you’ve missed it 👀
Robin Ebers · AI for Business Owners
@robinebers
22h
ANTHROPIC IS SO BACK
conductor, t3 code, helmor and more can continue to use your subscription
are they learning to play nice? 👉👈 🥹
11:03 AM · Jun 16, 2026 67.1K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: Anthropic撤销Claude订阅编程使用暂停计划
discovery_record.discovery_summary: Anthropic确认Claude用户仍可使用其订阅额度，通过Agent SDK进行程序化（编程）调用。此前Anthropic曾宣布暂停这一做法，但最近用户收到邮件通知该计划已取消。这意味着conductor、t3 code、helmor等工具可继续利用订阅进行编程式使用。Anthropic调整了政策，允许订阅用户保留程序化调用的能力。

key_excerpts.text: Anthropic确认Claude用户仍可使用其订阅额度，通过Agent SDK进行程序化（编程）调用。此前Anthropic曾宣布暂停这一做法，但最近用户收到邮件通知该计划已取消。这意味着conductor、t3 code、helmor等工具可继续利用订阅进行编程式使用。Anthropic调整了政策，允许订阅用户保留程序化调用的能力。
